prompt: I want to add accessibility auditing to every UI test without writing it in each test method. What's the pattern?

assertions.rationale: Skill's regression pattern: audit in tearDown

assertions.text: Shows how to filter known issues with the closure parameter
assertions.rationale: Skill documents the issue filter closure to ignore known issues

assertions.text: Mentions this catches regressions at zero additional test-writing cost
assertions.rationale: Skill's CI integration: every UI test also validates accessibility
